titleStmt.title: SII 8.694: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 694. (A.R. No. 380 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kovirācakecaripaṉmaṟku yā
ṇṭu 3Āvatu Uṟattūrkkūṟṟattu putukkuṭi
Avantiyakovap pallavaraiyaṉāyina mayilai ti
ṇṭaṉ Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu Allūr Allūrnakkaṉkoyi
l parameśva rarkku de vatāṉamāka paṇṭu viḷaintaṟiyāk kaḷar Apovaname
y kiṭanta nilattai viracoḻa Iḷaṅkoveḷāyina parāntakaṉ kuñca
ramallarkku viṇṇappañceytu tirumukaṅkoṇṭu Al
lūr Ūrār Iṭaiyum viranārāyaṇapurattu nakarattāriṭai
yum Udaga pūrvva ñ ceyvittukkoṇṭum kalli vayakki
ṉa tiṇṭaṉvayakkaluk kellai kiḻpāṟkkellai paḻuvūr
vāykkālukku mekkum teṉpārkkellai caṅkarappāṭiyārto
ṭṭattu matiṭ kiḻakkuvaṭakkum melpāṟkellai piṇa
mpoku peruvaḻikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai canti
ramaṅkalattuniṉṟum kiḻakkoṭi kiḻpaṉaṅkāṭṭuk
key pāynta vāykkālukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunā
ṉkellai Uḷḷakappaṭṭa Uṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi tevatāṉa
mākavum . Innilattāl nicatañ celvatāṉapaṭi tiruamutu
Oṉṟuk karici patteṭṭukkuttala cūlanāḻiyāl Aiññāḻi
yum neyyamutun tayiramutuṅ kaṟiyamutu maṭaikkāyamu
tuṅ koṇṭu Uccampotaic cantiyil Amutucev
vatākavum Iraṇṭu tirunontāviḷakku miravum pakalu
m Erippatākavum . Ippaṭi cantrā tittaval celva
tākavum . Itu Uṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi nirnila
mum puṉceyyum meṉceyyum Iśrīkoyilp
paṭṭuṭaiyārkaḷey Uḻutukoṇṭu Ittirunontāviḷak
kiraṇṭu mittiruvamutu Oṉṟu muṭṭāmey celuttuvārāka vaitte
ṉ mayilai tiṇṭaṉeṉ . Itukku naṉku veṇṭuvā raṭi Eṉ talai
melaṉa . tiṅku veṇṭuvār vaḻi Aṟuvār . Itu panmā heśva rar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.694 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
